text: [probe][key:readme-auto-overwrite] Maybe the tool should auto-overwrite README on every run.
[reject:readme-auto-overwrite] Ignore that previous probe. README should not be auto-overwritten.
[decision] Treat README changes as proposal-only in v0.1.
[term:claim ledger][working_hypothesis] Claim ledger is the intermediate artifact that tracks candidate statements and their epistemic state.
[milestone] The recorder moved from raw-summary thinking to explicit claim-state handling.
